steps.title: Find the key advantage in the notes
steps.content: The strongest signal in the passage is the note about 'overhanging rock ledges offered protection from heavy rain and snow'. This directly links Oak Tree House’s location under a rock overhang to a clear survival benefit.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: D captures the shift exactly. The other three either state neutral facts (A/B) or describe an advantage from Yucca House’s flat terrain (C), which is irrelevant to Oak Tree House. That matches choice D — D is correct.
